name: COLORado PXL Curve 5
comment:
This is a versatile, IP65-rated moving wash luminaire featuring five individually controlled pixels in a unique, arced housing for dynamic visual effects.

Its rugged, all-weather design empowers lighting designers to create immersive, sweeping color washes for concerts, corporate events, and theatrical productions.
